description: Strategic review meeting with Strategist. Incorporate insights from Japanese growth article (0→1000 followers playbook). Discussion topics: 1) Persona & story design for @meruru_tcbn — create character narrative, backstory, emotional hooks (キャラ × 世界観 × 一貫性). 2) Profile optimization — audit current bio against who/what/why framework. 3) Algorithm optimization — 初速反応率 → 滞在時間 → プロフィール遷移率, how to improve dwell time and profile transition. 4) Content volume plan — path to 30-50 initial posts. 5) Engagement quality — upgrade from generic templates to personalized 1-on-1 style replies. 6) Updated growth roadmap for EN account. Read latest scout data (data/scout_compact_20260309.json or latest), current strategy (data/strategy_current.json), core strategy (data/core_strategy.json), and account status. Strategist should propose concrete changes. Output: data/agent_meeting_20260310.json with full meeting minutes, then generate HTML report and send via Telegram.
notes: Operator shared a Japanese article about 0→1000 follower growth. Key framework: design before posting, persona × worldview × consistency, profile optimization, algorithm understanding (reaction rate → dwell time → profile visits), story-driven content, high initial content volume (30-50 posts), quality engagement (1-on-1 feeling). EN account only (JP suspended). Current EN account is @meruru_tcbn sub-account.
